title: Claude Code — Activity & Token Audit (30 hari)
description: Audit aktivitas Claude Code: rekap 30 hari semua user, tabel per-prompt "header detail" (total token + rincian input/output/cacheCreate/cacheRead + biaya), dan drill-down per prompt (linimasa native, tool actions, response, serta hook/command per sesi). Token/biaya bersumber dari LOGS api_request (ber-prompt.id), bukan metrics. SET TIME-PICKER KE "Last 30 days". Bagian Activity Trapping Service (ML LAB / Bank Mega).

widgets.title: Total Prompt
widgets.description: Jumlah prompt unik (prompt.id) pada rentang waktu.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT count(DISTINCT attributes_string['prompt.id']) AS v FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE attributes_string['event.name']='api_request' AND attributes_string['prompt.id']!='' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp_nano}} AND {{.end_timestamp_nano}}

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toUInt64(sum(attributes_number['input_tokens']+attributes_number['output_tokens']+attributes_number['cache_creation_tokens']+attributes_number['cache_read_tokens'])) AS v FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE attributes_string['event.name']='api_request' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp_nano}} AND {{.end_timestamp_nano}}

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT round(sum(attributes_number['cost_usd']),4) AS v FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE attributes_string['event.name']='api_request' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp_nano}} AND {{.end_timestamp_nano}}

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT count(DISTINCT attributes_string['user.email']) AS v FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE attributes_string['event.name']='api_request' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp_nano}} AND {{.end_timestamp_nano}}

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT count() AS v FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE attributes_string['event.name']='tool_result' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp_nano}} AND {{.end_timestamp_nano}}

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT count() AS v FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE attributes_string['event.name']='api_request' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp_nano}} AND {{.end_timestamp_nano}}

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfDay(toTimeZone(fromUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp),'Asia/Jakarta')) AS ts, toUInt64(sum(attributes_number['input_tokens']+attributes_number['output_tokens']+attributes_number['cache_creation_tokens']+attributes_number['cache_read_tokens'])) AS total_token FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE attributes_string['event.name']='api_request' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp_nano}} AND {{.end_timestamp_nano}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfDay(toTimeZone(fromUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp),'Asia/Jakarta')) AS ts, round(sum(attributes_number['cost_usd']),4) AS cost_usd FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE attributes_string['event.name']='api_request' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp_nano}} AND {{.end_timestamp_nano}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

widgets.title: Rekap per User (token & biaya)
widgets.description: Per user.email: jumlah prompt, rincian token, total token, dan biaya.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT attributes_string['user.email'] AS user, count(DISTINCT attributes_string['prompt.id']) AS prompts, toUInt64(sum(attributes_number['input_tokens'])) AS input, toUInt64(sum(attributes_number['output_tokens'])) AS output, toUInt64(sum(attributes_number['cache_creation_tokens'])) AS cache_create, toUInt64(sum(attributes_number['cache_read_tokens'])) AS cache_read, toUInt64(sum(attributes_number['input_tokens']+attributes_number['output_tokens']+attributes_number['cache_creation_tokens']+attributes_number['cache_read_tokens'])) AS total_token, round(sum(attributes_number['cost_usd']),4) AS cost_usd FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE attributes_string['event.name']='api_request' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp_nano}} AND {{.end_timestamp_nano}} GROUP BY user ORDER BY total_token DESC

widgets.title: Audit per Prompt — token & biaya (klik prompt_id lalu pakai di drill-down)
widgets.description: Satu baris per prompt: waktu (WIB), user, model, jumlah api_call, rincian token (input/output/cacheCreate/cacheRead), TOTAL token, biaya, cuplikan teks prompt, dan prompt_id untuk drill-down.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query:
SELECT
  formatDateTime(toTimeZone(fromUnixTimestamp64Nano(r.last_ts),'Asia/Jakarta'),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS waktu_wib,
  r.user AS user, r.model AS model, r.api_calls AS api_calls,
  r.input AS input, r.output AS output, r.cache_create AS cache_create, r.cache_read AS cache_read,
  (r.input + r.output + r.cache_create + r.cache_read) AS total_token,
  r.cost_usd AS cost_usd,
  substring(p.prompt, 1, 140) AS prompt,
  r.prompt_id AS prompt_id
FROM (
  SELECT attributes_string['prompt.id'] AS prompt_id, max(timestamp) AS last_ts,
    any(attributes_string['user.email']) AS user, any(attributes_string['model']) AS model, count() AS api_calls,
    toUInt64(sum(attributes_number['input_tokens'])) AS input,
    toUInt64(sum(attributes_number['output_tokens'])) AS output,
    toUInt64(sum(attributes_number['cache_creation_tokens'])) AS cache_create,
    toUInt64(sum(attributes_number['cache_read_tokens'])) AS cache_read,
    round(sum(attributes_number['cost_usd']),4) AS cost_usd
  FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2
  WHERE attributes_string['event.name']='api_request' AND attributes_string['prompt.id']!='' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp_nano}} AND {{.end_timestamp_nano}}
  GROUP BY prompt_id
) r
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT attributes_string['prompt.id'] AS prompt_id, argMax(attributes_string['prompt'], timestamp) AS prompt
  FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE attributes_string['event.name']='user_prompt' GROUP BY prompt_id
) p ON r.prompt_id = p.prompt_id
ORDER BY r.last_ts DESC
LIMIT 300

widgets.title: ① Pilih Prompt — daftar prompt terbaru (cocokkan prompt.id ke dropdown atas)
widgets.description: Daftar user_prompt terbaru beserta prompt.id. Salin prompt.id ke variabel "prompt_id" di atas untuk drill-down.

widgets.title: ② Header Detail Token — prompt terpilih
widgets.description: Rincian token untuk prompt terpilih: input, output, cacheCreate, cacheRead, TOTAL, biaya, jumlah api_call, model.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT any(attributes_string['user.email']) AS user, any(attributes_string['model']) AS model, count() AS api_calls, toUInt64(sum(attributes_number['input_tokens'])) AS input, toUInt64(sum(attributes_number['output_tokens'])) AS output, toUInt64(sum(attributes_number['cache_creation_tokens'])) AS cache_create, toUInt64(sum(attributes_number['cache_read_tokens'])) AS cache_read, toUInt64(sum(attributes_number['input_tokens']+attributes_number['output_tokens']+attributes_number['cache_creation_tokens']+attributes_number['cache_read_tokens'])) AS total_token, round(sum(attributes_number['cost_usd']),4) AS cost_usd FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE attributes_string['event.name']='api_request' AND attributes_string['prompt.id']={{.prompt_id}} AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp_nano}} AND {{.end_timestamp_nano}}

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toUInt64(sum(attributes_number['input_tokens']+attributes_number['output_tokens']+attributes_number['cache_creation_tokens']+attributes_number['cache_read_tokens'])) AS v FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE attributes_string['event.name']='api_request' AND attributes_string['prompt.id']={{.prompt_id}} AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp_nano}} AND {{.end_timestamp_nano}}

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT round(sum(attributes_number['cost_usd']),4) AS v FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE attributes_string['event.name']='api_request' AND attributes_string['prompt.id']={{.prompt_id}} AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp_nano}} AND {{.end_timestamp_nano}}

widgets.title: ③ Linimasa — semua aksi prompt terpilih (urut waktu)
widgets.description: Seluruh event native (request, response, tool_decision, tool_result) untuk prompt terpilih, kronologis.

widgets.title: ④ Tool Actions (decision + result)
widgets.description: Aksi tool untuk prompt terpilih: nama tool, keputusan, input/hasil.

widgets.title: ⑤ Model Responses (isi jawaban Claude)
widgets.description: Isi response API model (api_response_body) untuk prompt terpilih.

widgets.title: ⑥ Hook & Command (layer kebijakan — per sesi prompt terpilih)
widgets.description: Event hook-layer (PreToolUse/PostToolUse/UserPromptSubmit dll) untuk SESI yang memuat prompt terpilih. Hook tidak ber-prompt.id, dipetakan via session.id. Menampilkan keputusan kebijakan, command, dan tool_input mentah.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query:
SELECT
  formatDateTime(toTimeZone(fromUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp),'Asia/Jakarta'),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') AS waktu_wib,
  attributes_string['event_kind'] AS hook, attributes_string['tool_name'] AS tool,
  attributes_string['decision'] AS decision, attributes_string['policy_rule_id'] AS rule,
  substring(attributes_string['command'], 1, 160) AS command,
  substring(attributes_string['tool_input'], 1, 200) AS tool_input
FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2
WHERE resources_string['service.name']='claude-code-hook'
  AND attributes_string['session.id'] IN (
    SELECT attributes_string['session.id'] FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2
    WHERE attributes_string['prompt.id']={{.prompt_id}} AND attributes_string['session.id']!='' )
  AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp_nano}} AND {{.end_timestamp_nano}}
ORDER BY timestamp ASC LIMIT 300

var-prompt-id.name: prompt_id
var-prompt-id.description: Pilih prompt.id untuk drill-down (panel ②–⑥). Cocokkan dengan tabel audit / picker ①.
var-prompt-id.queryValue: SELECT attributes_string['prompt.id'] AS prompt_id FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE attributes_string['event.name']='user_prompt' AND attributes_string['prompt.id']!='' GROUP BY prompt_id ORDER BY max(timestamp) DESC LIMIT 100
